experiences.title: Senior Software Engineer
bulletPoints: Design and operate a high-availability, event-driven telemetry platform using AWS IoT, Kinesis, Lambda, and DynamoDB with strict latency and reliability requirements.
Own platform APIs documented via OpenAPI and consumed by multiple downstream engineering teams.
Define and monitor SLOs; build Datadog dashboards and synthetic tests to manage system health and operational risk.
Serve as on-call first responder for production incidents, leading triage, mitigation, and postmortems to improve system resilience.
Automate infrastructure and deployment workflows using Terraform and custom GitHub Actions, enabling reliable and repeatable releases.
Act as technical lead within Agile teams, influencing architectural direction, prioritization, and release readiness.
Apply AI-assisted development tools (GitHub Copilot) to accelerate delivery while maintaining correctness through testing, peer review, and architectural validation.
Mentor engineers and promoted best practices in system design and reliability.

aiContext.situation: Wanted to work on high-impact autonomous systems and modern cloud-native architecture.
aiContext.approach: Designed and operated a high-availability, event-driven telemetry platform using AWS IoT, Kinesis, Lambda, and DynamoDB with strict latency and reliability requirements.
aiContext.technicalWork: Delivered a reliable fleet observability workflow that shortened incident triage cycles.
aiContext.lessonsLearned: Clear contracts and observability-first architecture reduce long-term operational risk.

experiences.title: Systems Architect
bulletPoints: Owned Azure infrastructure strategy, balancing performance, reliability, cost, and security across production systems.
Designed and deployed edge AI solutions using Docker and Nvidia GPUs, improving image-recognition performance by 700%.
Engaged with vendors to create and implement security‑focused data and network strategies for our LAN environment.
Established DevSecOps practices and secure CI/CD pipelines, achieving SOC 2 compliance.
Built MLOps workflows for TensorFlow in Docker and managed private container and artifact registries.

aiContext.situation: Opportunity to shape architecture and platform direction in a growing product company.
aiContext.approach: Built secure CI/CD and deployment standards while enabling faster engineering throughput.
aiContext.technicalWork: Created a platform maturity roadmap that balanced speed, security, and cost.
aiContext.lessonsLearned: Security and compliance should be built into delivery workflows, not bolted on later.

experiences.title: Lead Integration Engineer
bulletPoints: Built APIs in Node.js supporting mobile, web, and B2B channels at large scale.
Led distributed engineering efforts for integration delivery.
Unit Tests written in Mocha.
Monitored services with CloudWatch.
Wrote CloudFormation script.

aiContext.situation: Chance to lead high-scale integration architecture for a major global brand.
aiContext.approach: Drove API and integration reliability across multiple dependent teams.
aiContext.technicalWork: Established a delivery cadence that improved cross-team predictability.
aiContext.lessonsLearned: At scale, consistency in contracts and delivery process matters as much as raw coding speed.

experiences.title: Adjunct Faculty Instructor
bulletPoints: Taught CSC 443: Internet Programming in Node.js to undergraduate computer science students.

aiContext.situation: Offered an opportunity to teach and thought it was a great challenge.
aiContext.approach: Taught young minds how to develop software at scale.
aiContext.technicalWork: I still advise students on their careers.  There is a trust that was established.
aiContext.lessonsLearned: Let students know that the outcomes are always working code.  The journey and lessons learned are most important/

experiences.title: Principal Software Engineer
bulletPoints: Developed platform applications using Java,  Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS.
Container log aggregation using ElasticSearch,  Fluentd, and Kibana (EFK).
Developed application components that  interact with REST Services.
Container/Cluster monitoring using  Prometheus.
Decomposed monolithic applications into discrete services.
Developed applications using OAuth.

aiContext.situation: Joined when we were Core Informatics and eventual acquired by Thermo Fisher Scientific.
aiContext.technicalWork: Test automation, refactoring code to be more maintainable.
aiContext.lessonsLearned: Read the room.  The technology used was part of a larger narrative that made our organization give the impression that we were more technically competent then were.  This didn't sit well with me.

experiences.title: Software Development and DevOps Manager
bulletPoints: Managed a team of ten developers.
Developed pipelines in Jenkins to deploy to applications to AWS.
Process analysis and documentation.
Manage reviews and professional  development.

aiContext.situation: Joined to take on higher-impact technical ownership in a complex environment.
aiContext.approach: Focused on clear architecture, reliable delivery, and practical collaboration across teams.
aiContext.technicalWork: Delivered production systems with strong emphasis on operability and measurable outcomes.
aiContext.lessonsLearned: Strong contracts and observability improve long-term delivery speed and reliability.

experiences.title: Team Lead / Senior Software Engineer
bulletPoints: Led onshore and offshore development teams building a commercial real-time bill payment web service used by major retail establishments.
Owned client relationships, project estimation, code reviews, and performance tuning for a system processing over $1M in daily transactions.
Progressed from Senior Software Engineer to Team Lead over ~5 years, growing scope from individual contribution to team and delivery ownership.
